Insurance job totally fraud job hai mat karna koi bhi aur isme bahot pressure rahta hai. Agar business laoge to salary milega nahi to ghanta hilate rahna.
Insurance job totally Target based job hota hai.
Company naye ladko ko hir karti hai taki kuch business mil jaye kuch mahine baad company ladko ko nikal deti hai manager. Branch head in sabko kuch nahi ata ye sabhi naye candidate pe depend rahte hai.msnwger, branch head ye sab business nahi late hai sirf naye bande ko murga banate hai.
Aaj ke samay log LIC company ko jante hai baki sari private company me dum nahi hai.
